PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS CONTINUED FROM APR-30-2025 TO JUN-11-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 204 ISSUE(S) NECESSITATING CONTINUANCE: (1) A COPY OF THE TRUST WAS NOT ATTACHED TO THE PETITION FOR THE COURT TO BE ABLE TO DETERMINE WHO IS ENTITLED TO NOTICE. (2) IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT THE PETITIONER SIGNED/VERIFIED THE PETITION. [PROBATE CODE SECTIONS 1020 AND 1021.] (3) IF THE TRUST IS NOT BEING ADMINISTERED IN THIS COUNTY, THIS WOULD NOT BE THE PROPER VENUE. WHEN A COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, THAT MEANS THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA; VENUE IS WHERE THE TRUSTEE ADMINISTERS THE TRUST. IF THIS IS THE PROPER VENUE, PLEASE PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE PETITION AND ANY OTHER SUPPORTING PAPERS TO THE ASSIGNED EXAMINER BY 5/28/25. (NO COURTESY COPIES HAVE BEEN PROVIDED, SO THE PETITION HAS ONLY BEEN CURSORILY REVIEWED ONLINE. [LRSF 2.7 B. AND 14.7 B.]) EXAMINER CONTINUANCES ARE FINAL AND NOT SUBJECT TO CONTEST UNDER LRSF 14.10 B. PER COURT
